title: Car Battery Size Selector
desc: Find the right car battery group size for your vehicle with our free online selector. Compare BCI group dimensions, CCA ratings, and get recommendations based on vehicle type and climate.

desc: Calculate your car's depreciation over time with our free online tool. Estimate yearly value loss based on purchase price, vehicle type, and annual mileage. Plan your car's resale value accurately.

title: Car Fuel Cost Calculator
desc: Calculate your trip fuel expenses instantly with our free car fuel cost calculator. Enter distance, MPG or L/100km, and gas price to estimate total cost, driving time, and carbon footprint.

title: Kilometers to Miles Converter
desc: Convert kilometers to miles instantly with our free online distance converter. Supports meters, feet, yards, running pace, and driving time estimates. Perfect for runners, cyclists, and travelers.

title: L/100km to MPG Converter
desc: Convert fuel consumption between L/100km and MPG instantly with our free bidirectional converter. Supports US and UK gallons, km/L, and includes a reference table for common fuel economy ratings.

title: Miles to Kilometers Converter
desc: Convert miles to kilometers instantly with our free online converter. Supports bidirectional conversion, common distance references, and driving time estimates for travel, running, and driving.

title: Speed Converter
desc: Convert speed units instantly with our free online speed converter. Supports mph, km/h, m/s, knots, ft/s, and Mach. Ideal for cars, planes, sports, and everyday use.

title: Tire Pressure Converter
desc: Convert tire pressure between PSI, bar, kPa, and kg/cm2 with our free online converter. Instantly get accurate pressure conversions for cars, bikes, and trucks.

title: Trip Cost Estimator
desc: Estimate total road trip expenses including gas, tolls, parking, and vehicle wear. Plan your travel budget with accurate cost breakdown per mile. Free online trip cost calculator.
